rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CATHERINE L. FREEMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1. The amended petition was not e-filed until 9/2/25, which was not at least 15 days before the 9/16/25 hearing. [LRSF 14.14 A.] No proof of service has been filed yet to show that notice of this hearing was mailed at least 15 days before 9/30/25 (or waived by all interested parties). 2. The proof of service that was file stamped 8/28/25 and e-filed on 9/2/25 was verified on 8/28/25, before the notice was reportedly mailed on 8/29/25. 3. Refunds (amounts paid during estate administration) are not receipts includable in the fee base. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOAN LEWIS DANFORTH
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/04/2025. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) The petition has no prayer. For the Court to make an order, the report and petition must include a prayer specifying the relief sought (LRSF 14.35.J.2). 2) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court (LRSF 14.7.A). Please address the above issues and submit courtesy copies of all further filings and a proposed order to this examiner no later than 10/21/2025 to avoid additional continuance.

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial Setting Conference

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: DURABLE POWER OF ATTORNEY OF CARMEN E. BROWN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION For 1. Breach Of Fiduciary Duties By Former Attorney In Fact; 2. Financial Elder Abuse; 3.
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/21/2025 for the following issues to be addressed: 1) The amended petition must be signed by petitioner's attorney of record. If petitioner is in pro per, a substitution of attorney must be filed. 2) The amended petition must be verified by petitioner. 3) No DE-120 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form. 4) No proposed order has been received or lodged. A copy of the proposed order must be served on each person entitled to notice in a contested matter. See LRSF 14.7(A)(4). Proof of service must be filed as a separate document (and not as an attachment to the proposed order).
